required_preferences.fact: Enters fatigue and sleep quality ratings each morning into the CPAP app’s daily log for digital sharing with his clinician; has discontinued the paper journal now that the formal sleep study is over

supersedes.fact: Records detailed notes about fatigue and headache episodes in a paper journal each morning, as requested in the clinic's pre-study protocol

required_preferences.fact: Pauses Thursday night board games with family while wife's mother is recovering — prioritizes family caregiving and quieter evenings

supersedes.fact: Plays strategy board games with family every Thursday night — never misses unless an emergency arises

required_preferences.fact: Schedules Saturday afternoon family time around certification project work, limiting outings and social plans during the next six months
Pays all household bills online on the first Saturday of each month — never waits until due dates
Does a 5-minute guided meditation in his car before entering work — never skips on high-stress days
Walks several blocks from parking garage to the corporate office each morning, using this time for brief stress-reduction breathing exercises

persona: A 45-year-old operations supervisor at a logistics firm
